insert-page-range-into-pdf.title: Insert Page Range from One PDF into Another
insert-page-range-into-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.title: Insert Page Range into PDF Using Streams
insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert a range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF by using file streams with the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor class.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Specific Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a specified position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-selected-pdf-pages-using-streams.title: Insert Selected PDF Pages Using Streams
insert-selected-pdf-pages-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert specific pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given position using file streams with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-pages-at-beginning-of-pdf.title: Insert Pages at Beginning of PDF using PdfFileEditor
insert-pages-at-beginning-of-pdf.description: Shows how to insert all pages from a source PDF at the start of another PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

insert-pdf-pages-at-specific-position.title: Insert PDF Pages at a Specific Position
insert-pdf-pages-at-specific-position.description: Demonstrates how to insert a range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given page index using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

append-pages-to-pdf.title: Append Pages from One PDF to Another
append-pages-to-pdf.description: Shows how to append all pages of a source PDF to the end of an existing destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor class.

insert-pdf-pages-in-memory.title: Insert PDF Pages In-Memory Using Aspose.Pdf
insert-pdf-pages-in-memory.description: Demonstrates loading PDFs into MemoryStream, inserting selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a specific position with PdfFileEditor.TryInsert, and returning the merged document as a MemoryStream.

batch-insert-page-ranges.title: Batch Insert Page Ranges from Multiple PDFs
batch-insert-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to merge specific page ranges from several source PDFs into a single destination PDF using a loop and Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

insert-multiple-pdf-page-ranges.title: Insert Multiple PDF Page Ranges into a Base PDF
insert-multiple-pdf-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to insert specific page ranges from several source PDFs into a base PDF in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

load-pdf-get-page-count.title: Load PDF and Retrieve Page Count
load-pdf-get-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from a file path using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and obtain the total number of pages.

load-pdf-and-save-to-new-file.title: Load PDF and Save to New File
load-pdf-and-save-to-new-file.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf Document, then saving it to a different file path.

insert-pages-into-pdf-and-save.title: Insert Pages from One PDF into Another and Save Result
insert-pages-into-pdf-and-save.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to insert selected pages from one PDF into a specific location of another PDF and write the modified document to a new file.

save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream using PdfPageEditor
save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates how to edit a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and save the resulting document directly into a MemoryStream without touching the file system.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF starting at page 1 up to a given end page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the resulting document.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page__v2.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page Using Streams
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF from the first page up to a given end page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with input and output streams for in‑memory processing.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.description: Shows how to split a PDF into multiple documents using start‑end page ranges with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor and save each part as a separate file.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets__v2.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF into defined page ranges (bulks) with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and obtain each bulk as a MemoryStream for further processing.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end.description: Shows how to split a PDF starting at a given page and save the resulting document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-to-end.description: Shows how to split a PDF beginning at a given page through the end of the document with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the result as a MemoryStream.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to split a PDF into individual one‑page PDF files and save each page to a designated output folder.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs__v2.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs Using Streams
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs__v2.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages, handling each page as a MemoryStream and writing it to a separate file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files Using MemoryStream
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual page streams with Aspose.Pdf and save each stream as a separate PDF file.

merge-split-pdfs-insertpages.title: Merge Split PDFs Using InsertPages
merge-split-pdfs-insertpages.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate multiple split PDF files into a single document by iteratively inserting pages with Aspose.Pdf's Insert method.

extract-first-n-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.title: Extract First N Pages from PDF using SplitFromFirst
extract-first-n-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst to extract the first N pages of a PDF and save them as a new document.

extract-front-pages-using-splitfromfirst.title: Extract Front Pages from PDF Using SplitFromFirst and Streams
extract-front-pages-using-splitfromfirst.description: Demonstrates how to extract the first N pages of a PDF into an in‑memory stream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst, then optionally save the result to a file.

split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Multiple Page Ranges Using SplitToBulks
split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate documents based on defined page ranges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks and save each part as an individual PDF file.

split-pdf-into-multiple-bulks.title: Split PDF into Multiple Bulks Using Streams
split-pdf-into-multiple-bulks.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into defined page ranges (bulks) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks and handle each bulk as a MemoryStream for further processing or saving.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade to split a PDF starting at a given page and save the remaining pages to a new file.

split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using In-Memory Streams
split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd with streams to split a PDF from a specified start page to the end, keeping the result in memory before optionally saving it.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages-using-st.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages Using Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-pages-using-st.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate page PDFs by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages with streams and saving each MemoryStream to a file.

delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.title: Delete Pages 2‑5 from PDF Using File Path Overload
delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages (2 through 5) from a PDF file by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the file‑path overload.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF using PdfFileEditor
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF by opening the file as a stream and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Delete, then saving the result to an output stream.

remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.title: Remove First and Last Pages from PDF
remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to determine a PDF's total page count with Document and then delete the first and last pages using PdfFileEditor.Delete and an integer array.

batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages from PDFs
batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a folder and remove specified pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

delete-pdf-pages-verify-count.title: Delete PDF Pages and Verify Page Count
delete-pdf-pages-verify-count.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF using PdfFileEditor and then validates the operation by comparing page counts before and after deletion with PdfViewer.

concatenate-three-pdfs-into-single-docum.title: Concatenate Three PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-three-pdfs-into-single-docum.description: Demonstrates how to merge three PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the three‑argument Concatenate method, employing a temporary file for the intermediate step.

merge-pdf-streams.title: Merge Multiple PDF Streams into a Single PDF
merge-pdf-streams.description: Demonstrates creating sample PDFs, opening them as streams, and merging them into one PDF using PdfFileEditor.Concatenate.

concatenate-two-pdfs.title: Concatenate Two PDFs into a Single PDF
concatenate-two-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge two existing PDF files on disk into a new PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor class and its Concatenate method.

concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-streams.title: Concatenate PDFs from Memory Streams to a File
concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-streams.description: Demonstrates how to load PDF files into memory streams, concatenate them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and write the merged result directly to an output file without intermediate storage.

batch-concatenate-pdfs-in-folder.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs in a Folder
batch-concatenate-pdfs-in-folder.description: Shows how to merge all PDF files located in a specific directory into a single PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.title: Measure PDF Concatenation Performance Using Streams
measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.description: Demonstrates concatenating fifty small PDFs with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor using stream overloads, automatically closing input streams, and measuring the execution time with Stopwatch.

compare-pdf-concatenation-memory-usage.title: Compare Memory Usage of PDF Concatenation (Path vs Stream)
compare-pdf-concatenation-memory-usage.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's file‑path and stream overloads while measuring the memory consumption of each approach.

create-pdf-booklet.title: Create PDF Booklet with Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with default settings.

create-a5-booklet-from-pdf.title: Create A5 Booklet from PDF
create-a5-booklet-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet with A5 page size from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet overload.

create-booklet-custom-page-order.title: Create Booklet with Custom Left/Right Page Order
create-booklet-custom-page-order.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by specifying odd (left) and even (right) page sequences using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-pdf-with-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size Using Streams
create-booklet-pdf-with-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using streams and specifying a custom page size (e.g., A5) with Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-booklet-per-folder.title: Create Booklet PDFs and Save to Separate Output Folders
create-pdf-booklet-per-folder.description: The example reads all PDF files from an input directory, generates a booklet version of each using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet, and stores each booklet in its own subdirectory.

delete-pages-create-booklet.title: Delete Pages and Create Booklet from PDF
delete-pages-create-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to remove unwanted pages from a PDF using PdfFileEditor.Delete and then generate a booklet layout with PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet.

delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs
delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF and then merge the edited PDF with another document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using PdfFileEditor
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, including a check for missing input files.

create-booklet-pdf-audit-log.title: Create Booklet PDF with Audit Logging
create-booklet-pdf-audit-log.description: Demonstrates generating a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor and logging each step of the batch process to a text file for audit purposes.

create-booklet-custom-page-order__v2.title: Create Booklet with Custom Left and Right Page Arrays
create-booklet-custom-page-order__v2.description: Demonstrates generating a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf's MakeBooklet method with custom left‑ and right‑page arrays, then verifies the resulting page order by extracting text from each page.

resize-pdf-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF to Letter Size Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-to-letter-size.description: Demonstrates how to resize an existing PDF to US Letter dimensions using the PdfPageEditor facade's file‑path overload, then save the result as a new file.

resize-pdf-pages-custom-dimensions-strea.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Dimensions Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-pages-custom-dimensions-strea.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF page size to 8.5" x 11" by using PdfFileEditor with the stream overload for resizing content.

batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A4 Using PdfPageEditor
batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and resize each document to A4 page size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

measure-pdf-resize-performance-path-vs-s.title: Measure PDF Resize Performance: Path vs Stream
measure-pdf-resize-performance-path-vs-s.description: The example resizes a large PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor via the file‑path overload and the stream overload, measuring the elapsed time for each to compare performance.

create-2up-pdf-layout.title: Create 2‑up PDF Layout with PdfFileEditor
create-2up-pdf-layout.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to generate a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) PDF and save it to a new file.

apply-4up-nup-layout-to-pdf.title: Apply 4‑up N‑Up Layout to PDF Using Stream Overload
apply-4up-nup-layout-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to create a 2 × 2 (4‑up) page grid on a PDF by reading from a file stream and writing the transformed document to a memory stream.

batch-create-nup-pdfs-3x2.title: Batch Create N‑up PDFs with 3 Columns and 2 Rows
batch-create-nup-pdfs-3x2.description: Shows how to iterate over a list of PDF files and generate N‑up versions (3 × 2 layout) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.title: Create N-up Layout and Convert to Booklet PDF
create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.description: Shows how to generate an N‑up PDF (multiple pages per sheet) and then convert that PDF into a printable booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-resize-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Using Streams
delete-pages-resize-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages from a PDF document using streams and then resize the remaining pages' contents before saving the result.

remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.title: Remove Pages from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.description: Shows how to delete specified pages from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-using-stream-overloads.title: Concatenate PDFs Using Stream Overloads
concatenate-pdfs-using-stream-overloads.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single PDF by opening each input as a FileStream and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor’s stream‑based Concatenate method.

delete-throws-exception-out-of-range.title: Test Delete Throws Exception for Out‑Of‑Range Page Numbers
delete-throws-exception-out-of-range.description: Shows how to unit‑test Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.Delete method to verify it throws an exception when a page number exceeds the document's length.

create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.title: Create Booklet PDF from Stream
create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.description: Shows how to convert an input PDF stream into a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and return the result as a MemoryStream.

create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.title: Create PDF Booklet with Custom Page Order
create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by specifying left and right page sequences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF with a custom 5.5 × 8.5 inch page size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.title: Validate PDF Concatenation Preserves Page Order
validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.description: Demonstrates concatenating two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf and verifying that the resulting document keeps the original page sequence by extracting and comparing page text.

delete-pages-from-folder.title: Delete Pages 3 and 4 from PDFs in a Folder
delete-pages-from-folder.description: Creates sample PDFs, then deletes pages 3 and 4 from each PDF in a source folder and saves the results to an output folder.

merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Logging Using PdfFileEditor
merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF files into a single document while logging each input and output file name, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-pdf-odd-left-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Odd-Numbered Left Pages
create-booklet-pdf-odd-left-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to generate a booklet PDF from a source stream while defining left pages as odd-numbered pages.

resize-pdf-1024x768-verify-fidelity.title: Resize PDF to 1024x768 and Verify Visual Fidelity
resize-pdf-1024x768-verify-fidelity.description: Shows how to resize all pages of a PDF to custom dimensions using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents (stream overload) and then render the first page with PdfConverter to compare pixel dimensions for visual verification.

batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages and Merge PDFs
batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specified pages from multiple PDF files and then concatenate the cleaned PDFs into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge several PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor. The program validates input files, concatenates them, and writes the result to a user‑specified output path.

merge-pdf-streams-no-temp-files.title: Merge PDF Streams without Temporary Files
merge-pdf-streams-no-temp-files.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF streams (e.g., from network sources) into a single PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor, avoiding any intermediate files on disk.

test-makebooklet-throws-exception-null-p.title: Test MakeBooklet Throws Exception for Null PageSize
test-makebooklet-throws-exception-null-p.description: Creates a temporary PDF, then calls PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with a null PageSize to verify that an exception is thrown, and cleans up the temporary files.

delete-pdf-pages-get-size.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF and Get Resulting Size
delete-pdf-pages-get-size.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and return the size of the modified document.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Pages
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files and automatically insert a blank page between each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-resize-pdfs-a5-create-booklet.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A5 and Create Booklet
batch-resize-pdfs-a5-create-booklet.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, resize each document to A5 using PdfPageEditor, and then generate a booklet version with PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-apply-2up-layout.title: Delete Pages and Apply 2‑up Layout to PDF
delete-pages-apply-2up-layout.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then create a 2‑up (side‑by‑side) layout before saving the result.

create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-o.title: Create Booklet PDF with Specified Page Order
create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-o.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by specifying left and right page sequences.

concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.title: Concatenate PDFs and Preserve Metadata with PdfFileEditor
concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor while keeping outlines, logical structure, and copying original metadata (author, title, etc.) to the resulting document.

create-booklet-pdf-delete-pages-resize.title: Create Booklet PDF with Page Deletion and Content Resize
create-booklet-pdf-delete-pages-resize.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF, resize the remaining page contents, and produce a booklet layout using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-pdf-booklets-custom-page-sizes.title: Create PDF Booklets with Custom Page Sizes
create-pdf-booklets-custom-page-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to generate booklets from existing PDFs using Aspose.Pdf with predefined and custom page sizes, and verifies the resulting documents.

concatenate-pdfs-in-zip.title: Concatenate PDFs Inside a ZIP Archive
concatenate-pdfs-in-zip.description: Shows how to read PDF files from a zip archive, merge them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and write the merged PDF back into the same archive.

delete-pdf-pages.title: Delete Pages from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
delete-pdf-pages.description: A command‑line utility that removes specified pages from an input PDF and writes the result to an output file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

parallel-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Parallel Deletion of Pages from Multiple PDFs
parallel-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor together with Parallel.ForEach to delete specified pages from several PDF files concurrently and save the results.

resize-pdf-landscape-booklet.title: Resize PDF to Landscape and Create Booklet
resize-pdf-landscape-booklet.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation using PdfPageEditor and then generate a booklet from the rotated document with PdfFileEditor.

unit-test-pdffileeditor-concatenate-empt.title: Unit Test for PdfFileEditor Concatenate with Empty Input
unit-test-pdffileeditor-concatenate-empt.description: Demonstrates a NUnit unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Concatenate throws an exception when called with an empty input stream array.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs-from-streams.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs from Streams
concatenate-multiple-pdfs-from-streams.description: Shows how to merge several PDF files supplied as streams using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and write the combined PDF to an output file.

log-deleted-pdf-pages-audit.title: Log Deleted PDF Pages with PdfFileEditor
log-deleted-pdf-pages-audit.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and record the number of pages removed in an audit log for traceability.

resize-pdfs-create-booklet.title: Resize PDFs and Create Booklet
resize-pdfs-create-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to resize each PDF to 1024x768 points, concatenate the resized PDFs, and convert the result into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from Multiple PDFs
delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove given pages from each PDF in a list using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor and returns the paths of the cleaned files.

insert-blank-separator-pages-when-mergin.title: Insert Blank Separator Pages When Merging PDFs
insert-blank-separator-pages-when-mergin.description: Shows how to concatenate multiple PDF documents while inserting a blank page between each file using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-and-concatenate-pdfs.title: Resize PDFs to 1024x768 and Concatenate into One Document
resize-and-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to batch resize multiple PDF files to a fixed page size using PdfPageEditor and then merge the resized files into a single PDF with PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-resize-pdf__v2.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content
delete-pages-resize-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF, resize the remaining page contents, and return the processed document as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.title: Concatenate PDFs and Add Page Numbers
concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document and automatically insert page numbers using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-booklet-pdf-from-first-half-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF from First Half Pages
create-booklet-pdf-from-first-half-pages.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF by selecting even (left) and odd (right) pages from the first half of a source PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.title: Create Booklet from Second Half Right Pages
create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF that contains only the right‑hand (odd‑numbered) pages from the second half of a source document using Aspose.Pdf.
